# AI Audit for Companies

> A formal AI audit for small and mid-sized companies. One 45-minute
> questionnaire produces a board-ready PDF report with an auditor's
> qualified or unqualified opinion on the company's AI tools, costs,
> risks, and governance. Tier 1 Snapshot: $399, report delivered by
> email immediately on completion. Operated by SRJ Consulting &
> Services LLC (srjconsultingservices.com).

## What the audit covers
- AI tool inventory, fully loaded cost map, and Shadow AI surface
- AI Readiness Scorecard: six conditions scored 0-100
- AI Risk & Governance Review(tm): data exposure, decision influence,
  vendor risk, governance maturity
- AI Efficiency & Process Optimization, including the AI Efficiency
  Tax(tm) and a 90-day plan
- A formal auditor's opinion with its basis: exceptions identified
  against a 100-point qualified-opinion checklist across five
  governance domains, each backed by the respondent's own evidence

## Who it is for
Owners and executives of companies (roughly 1-500 employees) that use
AI tools and need to account for them to boards, insurers, regulators,
banks, or enterprise customers.

## How it works
1. Answer 107 structured questions (about 45 minutes, resumable).
2. Four scoring frameworks plus AI-assisted auditor analysis evaluate
   the answers. "Don't know" answers become documented scope
   limitations.
3. A locked PDF report is emailed on completion, with a 7-day window
   to review and update answers.

SRJ Consulting & Services LLC. AI Risk & Governance Review(tm),
AI Efficiency Tax(tm), and Standing AI Adoption Policy(tm) are
trademarks of SRJ Consulting & Services LLC.
